sources.exact_document_title: The international EAACI/GA²LEN/EuroGuiDerm/APAAACI guideline for the definition, classification, diagnosis, and management of urticaria
sources.population: People with acute, chronic spontaneous, or inducible urticaria.
sources.clinical_setting: Allergy, dermatology, and general clinical assessment.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for urticaria definition and classification; detailed management text was not accessible and is not mapped.

exact_sections.heading: Official abstract: definition and presentation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Defines urticaria as a mast-cell-driven disease presenting with wheals, angioedema, or both and distinguishes acute and chronic forms.

exact_sections.heading: Official abstract: impact and scope
exact_sections.evidence_summary: States that chronic spontaneous or inducible urticaria can impair quality of life and work or school performance and that the guideline covers classification, diagnosis, and management.
